values: The score is computed as follows based on 4 variables:

Q("def") ~ C(Q("loan_int_rate_dis"), Treatment(reference=3)) + C(Q("loan_percent_income_dis"), Treatment(reference=3)) + C(Q("cb_person_default_on_file"), Treatment(reference='N')) + C(Q("home_ownership_3"), Treatment(reference='OWN'))
